overview: A phone-first drawing app where you sketch freehand on your screen, describe your vision to an AI, and get a ready-to-print cup wrap design. Draw on the canvas, snap a camera reference photo, tell the AI what you want — and download a print-ready image to wrap around your mug.
features: Touch freehand drawing canvas with brush size and color controls
Optional phone camera reference overlay with opacity toggle
AI-powered cup wrap image generation from your drawing and description
3D cup mockup preview of the generated design
Download print-ready PNG/JPG to apply to any cup or mug
